message.content:
A minimalist square graphic depicts a large solid red circle centered flat against a plain white background.

At the very center of the image sits a solid red sphere or disc. The circle is precisely geometric with smooth vector-style edges. The hue is a deep, saturated crimson red, with a subtle texture or slight grain within the circle. This single red motif takes up roughly 40% of the total image area. The entire shape is solid; no outlines or details appear within or around it.

The field around the central red circle is a solid, uniform white. There is no texture or gradient to the background. The high-contrast graphic image resembles the national flag of Japan (the Nisshōki, or Hinomaru flag), but is shown as a standalone square design with only the central disc and white background. The edges of the image are cleanly cut. There is no text, borders, or any secondary elements. The focus is exclusively on the stark, simple intersection of the large red circle and the flat white canvas. The overall composition is symmetrical and stark. The image has a clean, digital style with very flat colors and a sharp, well-defined silhouette, with no complex lighting or photographic elements.
